title: Cervical screening documentation
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.
investigations.rationale: Supports programme population and screening-pathway context for cervical screening documentation; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Defines programme population, HPV-based screening, triage and screen-triage-treat pathways with different considerations for women living with HIV.

source.title: WHO guideline for screening and treatment of cervical pre-cancer lesions for cervical cancer prevention, second edition

investigations.text: Supports documenting an entered HPV or triage result and clinician-selected next pathway while preserving age, HIV, test and programme qualifiers.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, programme eligibility, HIV status, prior screening, test, collection date, result, triage, communication, follow-up and clinician plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for cervical screening documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
